app.name: AutoParams
app.one_liner: AutoParams is a JUnit 5 extension for automatic test data generation in Java and Kotlin, inspired by AutoFixture.

screens.name: Test Parameter Injection
screens.purpose: Display how AutoParams eliminates manual test data setup by auto-generating and injecting parameter values into JUnit 5 test methods.
primary_actions: Define test parameters to be auto-generated
Run test with automatically populated inputs

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a configured test object using the Design API with fixed or dynamic property values.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for @Freeze to share object references across parameters
week 1: Enable automatic injection of generated parameters into test methods
week 1: Implement @AutoParams annotation support for basic types
acceptance_tests: Given a Product class with id, name, and priceAmount fields, when configured via Design.of().set().supply(), then instantiate() returns an object with specified fixed and dynamic values.
Given a test method annotated with @AutoParams, when it declares int parameters, then they are automatically populated with generated integers.
